headline: Norfolk Southern Balances Flat Sales With Rising Costs And Heavy Investment
summary: Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) is working through sustained operational challenges that have kept sales flat over the past two years. Over the same period, the company’s operating margin has weakened as expenses have risen. Free cash flow margin has also compressed, reflecting a more capital intensive set of investments. These trends point to a longer running shift in how Norfolk Southern is balancing costs, capacity, and growth plans. Norfolk Southern operates one of the major freight rail...

headline: Kintayl Capital Loads Up Qorvo Stock With 124,000 Shares Buy
summary: Qorvo delivers advanced RF and power management solutions for global mobile, infrastructure, and defense markets.
